title: Fisherman spooked after spotting glowing 'alien UFO' hovering above motorway
description: Brandon Barton said he could not believe his eyes when he noticed the strange glowing object drifting slowly through the sky and managed to capture footage on his phone

title: All you need to know about claims Trump's UFO files contain evidence of 'non-human craft'
description: Former US Deputy Assistant of Defence Christopher Mellon claims to have seen satellite imagery and videos of craft that 'don't look like anything we have built', with bombshell footage yet to be released by Trump

title: Donald Trump's UFO files contain bombshell footage of 'non-human craft'
description: Former US Deputy Assistant of Defence Christopher Mellon claims to have seen first hand proof of ETs, including photos and videos of a ship that looks nothing like what "we have built"

title: Pentagon Believes Babylon Working Rituals Could Have Triggered First Major UFO Wave
description: Pentagon insiders suggest Jack Parsons' Babylon Working rituals may have triggered the first major UFO wave, linking occult and aerial phenomena.

title: Alien Craft Lands In A Field In Rainhill England
description: The mystery surrounding an apparent sighting of a UFO above a power station 25 years ago deepened further when an amateur radio operator raised the possibility the ‘light in the sky’ actually landed in a local farmer’s [...]
